summary.what: Cut v0.20.1 patch release with post-commit hook fix
summary.why: Ship the post-commit gating fix as a patch so .beads-only commits stop triggering misleading nudges in downstream repos like gorewood/vellum that hit the bug
summary.how: just release 0.20.1 generated CHANGELOG.md via draft changelog | claude -p --model opus, regenerated decision-log and release-notes site examples, bumped the landing-page version badge, committed, tagged, and pushed origin main + v0.20.1 — GitHub Actions will publish binaries
